mapper.sql: select c.id, c.name, c.category, c.organizations, c.level, c.tags, c.scope_type, c.status, c.memo, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.del_flag, -- 新增：拼接所属学院名称（中文顿号分隔，去重） (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT d.dept_name SEPARATOR '、') FROM sam_competition_dept_rel rel LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON rel.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE rel.session_id = c.id) AS deptNames from sam_competition c
mapper.insert:
insert into sam_competition
name, category, organizations, level, tags, scope_type, status, memo, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag,
#{name}, #{category}, #{organizations}, #{level}, #{tags}, #{scopeType}, #{status}, #{memo}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from sam_competition where id in
#{id}

delete from sam_competition_dept_rel where session_id in
#{sessionId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sam_competition_dept_rel( id, session_id, dept_id, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.sort}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.delFlag})
